normalized_title: City of Melville Local Planning Scheme No. 6 - Scheme Map No. 3 of 8 (Melville and Myaree Localities)
version_date: Plot date 27 February 2026 (Version No 1; LPS6 gazetted Friday 27 May 2016)
scope_summary: Statutory scheme map sheet 3 of 8 under the City of Melville Local Planning Scheme No. 6 covering the Melville and Myaree localities. Depicts local scheme zones and reserves, region scheme reserves (railways, public purposes including prison and infrastructure services), R-Codes density codings (R20, R35, R40 and others visible in the extracted labels), and an AR1 additional-requirements notation for the Kardinya Activity Centre Plan. Used to determine the zoning and density coding applicable to individual lots in these localities.
quality_flags: scheme map drawing: low text volume of meaningful content is expected; extracted text is map labels and legend only

this sheet produced an unusually large volume of fragmented OCR label text (~1000 lines of single-character and reversed street-name strings); spatial zoning/coding assignments are not recoverable from text alone - use the original PDF or GIS data for lot-level determinations
